title: Conditionals
topics: zero · first · second · third conditional · mixed
description: Podmínkové věty — real, unreal a past conditions.

vocabulary.en: If + past perfect, would have + pp

vocabulary.cz: představ si, co by bylo kdyby

quiz.sentence: If I ___ (have) more time, I would learn Spanish. (2nd)
She would have called if she ___ (know) your number. (3rd)
If you study hard, you ___ (pass) the exam. (1st)
They ___ (not/arrive) late if they had taken a taxi. (3rd)

tasks: 1. Write 3 first conditional sentences about your near future
2. Write 3 second conditional sentences starting with 'If I were...'
3. Think of a moment you regret — write 2 third conditional sentences
